problem id: ee055f10
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11101100 -> 10110001
  11111010 -> 00010001
  00100100 -> 00111101
  11111001 -> 01000001
  00101110 -> 11011101
  00010001 -> 11001110
  10010000 -> 11110111
  11010011 -> 10100011

query: 01101101
predicted answer: 10001001
